[["AdaSpec", "is a", "speculative decoding technique"], ["AdaSpec", "dynamically tunes", "draft length K"], ["AdaSpec", "achieves", "2.7x end-to-end speedup on Llama-3 70B"]]

[["Trace-Critic Distillation", "is a", "knowledge distillation method"], ["Trace-Critic Distillation", "filters", "teacher traces with a learned critic"], ["1B student", "matches accuracy of", "8B baseline at 9% inference cost"]]

[["Listwise-Aligned BGE", "removes", "cross-encoder reranker at inference"], ["listwise loss", "distills", "reranker ordering into bi-encoder"], ["Listwise-Aligned BGE", "matches", "reranked baselines within 0.6 nDCG@10"]]

[["activation steering vectors", "reduce", "successful injection rate from 41% to 7%"], ["steering vectors", "are computed from", "residual stream activations"], ["defense", "requires no", "retraining"]]

[["LLM-generated pivot data", "bootstraps", "low-resource translation"], ["round-trip consistency filter", "removes", "38% of unfaithful generations"], ["filtered synthetic set", "improves BLEU by", "6.3 points on FLORES-200"]]
[["VCC", "pairs", "constitutional clauses with programmatic verifiers"], ["programmatic verifier", "provides", "deterministic reward signal"], ["VCC", "improves", "clause adherence by 23 points"]]
RA-MoE has 47B total parameters and uses top-2 routing over 32 experts, achieving a 38% reduction in p99 decode latency.
HA-Retrieve is a two-stage encoder that routes top-32 sentence windows through a cross-encoder, improving recall@10 by 17 points over BGE-large.
